2605.05703.title: Active Learning for Communication Structure Optimization in LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
2605.05703.paper_summary: Optimizing the communication structure of large language model based multi-agent systems (LLM-MAS) has been shown to improve downstream performance and reduce token usage. Existing methods typically rely on randomly sampled training tasks. However, tasks may differ substantially in difficulty and domain, and thus they are not equally informative for updating communication structure, making optimization under limited training budgets often unstable and highly sensitive to the particular training set. To actively identify the most valuable tasks for communication-structure optimization, we propose an ensemble-based information-theoretic task selection framework. The proposed method estimates task informativeness by how much a candidate task changes the distribution over graph parameters, using ensemble Kalman inversion as an efficient and derivative-free approximation of the corresponding Bayesian update. The resulting estimator is especially suitable for black-box and noisy multi-agent systems. To enhance scalability, we construct a compact candidate pool through embedding-based representative selection and combine the informative selection with surrogate modeling and batch Thompson sampling. We validate our method in both benign settings and settings with agent attacks, demonstrating its effectiveness for communication-structure optimization under constrained computational budgets.
2605.05703.paper_summary_zh: 優化基於大型語言模型的多代理系統（LLM-MAS）的通信結構已被證明能提高下游性能並減少令牌使用。現有的方法通常依賴隨機抽樣的訓練任務。然而，任務在難度和領域上可能有顯著差異，因此它們對於更新通信結構的資訊量並不相等，這使得在有限的訓練預算下進行優化往往不穩定且對特定訓練集高度敏感。為了主動識別對通信結構優化最有價值的任務，我們提出了一種基於集成的信息論任務選擇框架。所提出的方法通過候選任務如何改變圖參數的分佈來估計任務的信息量，使用集成卡爾曼反演作為對應貝葉斯更新的高效且無導數的近似。所得到的估計器特別適合於黑箱和噪聲多代理系統。為了增強可擴展性，我們通過基於嵌入的代表性選擇構建了一個緊湊的候選池，並將信息選擇與代理建模和批量湯普森抽樣相結合。我們在良性環境和代理攻擊環境中驗證了我們的方法，證明其在受限計算預算下進行通信結構優化的有效性。
2605.05703.author: Huchen Yang et.al.
2605.05703.authors: Huchen Yang, Xinghao Dong, Dan Negrut, Jin-Long Wu
